io/IOBase/closed.name: closed
io/IOBase/closed.description: True if the stream is closed.

info.excerpt: True if the stream is closed.

io/IOBase/close.name: close
io/IOBase/close.description: Flush and close this stream. This method has no effect if the file is already closed. Once the file is closed, any operation on the file (e.g. reading or writing) will raise a ValueError. As a convenience, it is allowed to call this method more than once; only the first call, however, will have an effect.
